---
title: "Software"
---

::: {.page-header}
<div class="kicker">Software and decision tools</div>
# Online tools and reproducible modelling workflows
Tools that translate research outputs into transparent decision support, economic evaluation and applied choice modelling.
:::

::: {.content}
::: {.tool-card}
::: {}
### eMANDEVA Decision Aid
Policy decision aid for vaccine mandate scenarios, predicted support, lives-saved benefits, benefit-cost outputs and exportable summaries.
:::
[Open tool](https://mesfingenie.com/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/){.button .dark}
:::

::: {.tool-card}
::: {}
### Farming BCA Tool
Benefit-cost analysis tool for farm trials and soil-management interventions, including net present value, benefit-cost ratio, gross profit margin, ROI and sensitivity analysis.
:::
[Open tool](https://mesfingenie.com/farming-bca-tool-v18/){.button .dark}
:::

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### MATLAB choice modelling workflows
Reusable estimation workflows for MNL, mixed logit, latent class models, pooled-country models, interaction models, bootstrapped derived measures and publication-ready outputs.
:::
::: {.card}
### Eye-tracking DCE analysis
Workflow components for fixation measures, transition matrices, first-fixation analysis, time-course attention shares, DCE estimation and attention-choice models.
:::
::: {.card}
### Quantum-like choice models
Experimental modelling workflows for interference, contextuality, classical comparison models, predictive checks and interpretation of quantum-like choice behaviour.
:::
::: {.card}
### Benefit-cost reporting
Reproducible reporting templates for economic metrics, sensitivity scenarios, figures, and PDF/Word outputs for stakeholder use.
:::
:::
:::
